steps.title: Identify the function
steps.content: The underlined sentence uses While to oppose two frequencies: HGT is common in prokaryotes but rarely observed in eukaryotes. Its job is to contrast detection frequency across organism categories.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: Choice A captures that frequency contrast across two organism categories. B (similarity), C (flawed perception), and D (mechanics) all miss the frequency comparison. That matches choice A — A is correct.
